dialogue:
[A] It's a Toyota Corolla.  I love it.  How about you?
[B] I drive a Honda Civic. It's the best car I've ever owned.
[A] I love Hondas.  They're so reliable.  Do you have any hobbies?
[B] I like to write poetry and donate my old clothes. What do you like to do?
[A] I love to read Stephen King books.  He's one of my favorite authors.
[B] I haven't read any of his books, but I've heard good things. What's your favorite book of his?
[A] My favorite of his is The Shining.  Have you seen the movie?  It came out in 1997.
[B] I've seen it, but it's been so long that I don't remember much about it.
[A] Is there anything else I can do for you?
[B] Yes, I'd like to find an Adventure movie.
[A] I found [count] movie you might like. How about [title]?
[B] The Aftermath sounds great. That's all I need for now.
[A] Okay, have a great day. I hope you enjoy the movie. Bye.!.

[A] I'm going surfing. I love it. What do you like to do on your free time?
[B] I like to garden and spend time with my family. Do you have a favorite place to surf?
[A] Where would you like to surf?
[B] I'd like to find a garden in San Francisco.
[A] I found [count] attractions you might like. How about a park called [attraction_name]?
[B] Sure, that sounds good.
[A] You should check out the [category] known as the park, called the Attractionname.
[B] Okay, great. That's all I need for now.
[A] Okay, have a nice day. Goodbye for the day. Bye for now!

[A] No, I've never played any of those. I'm more of an Xbox gamer myself.
[B] I used to play a lot of video games when I was younger, but I haven't in a while.
[A] What kind of games do you like to play? I'm a big fan of first-person shooters.
[B] I like first person shooters as well. I also like RPGs and adventure games.
[A] Adventure games are fun. Do you have a favorite adventure game that you've played recently?
[B] I recently played the Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild. Have you played it?
[A] You may like to play the title in your kitchen. Do you like to play the title on the soundboard?
[B] Yeah, I'd like to play it on the speaker in the kitchen.
[A] Please confirm: playing [song_name] on the [playback_device].
[B] Yes, that's right.
[A] Okay, so you want to play [title] with no subtitles?
[B] Yes, please. Who directed it?
[A] [directed_by] is the director. I will start the movie now.
[B] Thank you. That's all I need.
[A] You're welcome. Have a good day. Bye.  [title] is now playing.

[A] I would love to read it.  I love hiking.  What else do you like to do?
[B] I like to hike too. I also like to travel. I've been to Ireland and Australia.
[A] I have never been to either of those places.  Have you ever been to New Zealand?
[B] What do you do for a trip? Whenever you do, you would like to go to New York to visit the famous attractions.
[A] Yes, I want to go to New York City. I'd like to visit some attractions there.
[B] I found [count] attractions for you. How about the [attraction_name]? It's a [category].
[A] Okay, that sounds good.
[B] Okay, let's confirm the details: You want me to go to [event_location] on [date] at [time], and you want [party_size] people.
[A] Yes, that's right.
[B] I'll play [song_name] on the [playback_device], is that okay?
[A] Yes, please do.
[B] Sure, please confirm your request to play [title] with no subtitles.

[A] I'm sorry to hear that. Do you have any other pets that you can take with you?
[B] I don't have any pets right now, but I used to have a dog when I was younger.
[A] Oh, I see. What kind of dog did you have when you were younger? I love dogs!
[B] I had a Labrador Retriever. He was the best dog ever.
[A] Aww, I love labradors! They're so sweet and gentle. What do you like to do for fun?
[B] I like to watch movies and play video games. I also like to read. What about you?
[A] Are you looking for another movie?
[B] I really like fantasy movies. I'd like to find something directed by Hiroyasu Ishida.
[A] I found [count] movie you might like. How about [title]?
[B] The Poseidon Adventure sounds great. I want to watch it now.
[A] Please confirm the following: Play the movie titled Poseodon with subtitles.
[B] Yes, that's right.
[A] Please confirm: Playing [title] with sub titles: Enjoy the movie.
[B] Yes, thank you.
[A] The movie has started playing. Enjoy your movie. Hope you enjoy the same. Bye.
